title: aleki's Nifty Ships
description: A new generation of vanilla-friendly ships. In-world building, simulated sailing, placeable containers, walkable decks -- oh, and cannons!
body:
<iframe width="1000" height="564" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/U-JHLoUPUgE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## [Thank you to our patrons for supporting development!](https://www.patreon.com/alekismods)
- Beebee

## Welcome to the future of vanilla-friendly ships!
Nifty Ships brings beautiful, detailed ships with loads of features to Minecraft.

Find unfinished rowboats and ships on beaches and rivers, and learn how to complete them!

Build your ship, fill it with cargo, creatures, or cannons, and sail it across the seas with a realistic sailing simulation!

Make it your own by painting the hull, dyeing the sails, naming your ship, and flying a banner from the mast. Upgrade it into an icebreaker by adding an iron block!

Defeat your enemies (or friends) in epic naval battles, with cannons that work on sea or land!

When it's time to return to port, you can lower the anchor or tie up at the dock.

Place any container in the hold or on deck, from shulker boxes, to furnaces, to crafting tables, and more!

## Welcome to the future of mod-friendly ships!
First-party support for [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) through our official [Firma: Civilization](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmaciv) mod!

First-party support for [Biomes O'Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) through our official [Nifty Ships + Biomes O'Plenty Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/alekishipsbop) addon!

![A Minecraft ship is sailed on a sunny day, its deck and hold filled with furnaces, crafting apparatuses, and containers.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vuNeeDyl/images/642f72cb102a98a20cf1189048096b06a6d1b1bb.png)


<details>
<summary>Roadmap</summary>

- 1.21 support*
- Unique sound design*
- Better collision system to allow for larger ships*
- Move to flywheel rendering to reduce framerate impact*
- Upgrade vanilla boats to have some of our features
- Larger, two-masted ship
- Even larger, three-masted ship
- Overhaul of sunken ship structures
- ((Secret 4th ship))
- ((Secret 5th ship))
- More decoration options
- Fabric support

</details>



  \*_In Development_







_A mod by alekiponi, with major contributions from Traister101. All art, assets, code, documentation, and any other material provided are exclusively human made._
